Home → Discography → Crossroads: 2010

Crossroads: 2010

2010 · Sumerian Records

Bizzy Bone's genre-defying rap rock album released through Sumerian Records, home to acts like August Burns Red and Asking Alexandria. A bold creative departure that blended his signature rapid-fire delivery with rock production, featuring guest appearances and production from artists far outside his usual musical sphere. Received positive feedback from both hip hop and rock fans.

"I get the flippin in fucking them up, If Lil Layzie tell me shoot em I'm shootin them up."

— The Soul
01 The Soul produced by Juigi, Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen ▷
02 Bottled Up Like Smoke produced by Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen feat. Johnny Craig ▷
03 Nintendo produced by Ash Avildsen, Frank Nitty, Ace, I See Starts, Shawn Keith & Javier Reyes ▷
04 Cowboy produced by Juigi, Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen feat. Devin Oliver ▷
05 Army On The Way produced by Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen ▷
06 Stonehenge produced by Heinz, Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen ▷
07 Automatic Rewind produced by Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen feat. Danny Worsnop ▷
08 Gangsta Music produced by Juigi, Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen ▷
09 American Soldier produced by Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen ▷
10 So Cool produced by Raw C, Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen ▷
11 My Session produced by Raw C, Shawn Keith, John Mehoves, Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen ▷
12 How I Feel produced by Dirty Paper & Javier Reyes ▷
13 Last Call: Fallen produced by Dirty Paper, Javier Reyes & Ash Avildsen ▷
